name: MusicBoard
description: Let users nominate YouTube links to a dedicated music channel by reacting with 🔗. Posts a rich embed with title, thumbnail, and who nominated it.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: MusicBoard loaded! Use `[p]musicboard channel #your-channel` to set the music channel, then react with 🔗 on any YouTube link to nominate it.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores the designated music channel ID and a list of nominated message IDs per guild.
